yoshiBeginnerGuide.title: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book Beginner Guide
yoshiBeginnerGuide.intro: Start by learning Yoshi and the Mysterious Book's exploration loop: enter habitats, test each creature interaction, record discoveries, and turn discoveries into chapter progress.

steps.title: Meet Mr. E and Read the First Page
steps.description: Follow Mr. E's prompts and treat every page as a discovery space instead of a speedrun route.

steps.title: Scan Habitats With the Magnifying Glass
steps.description: Move the lens across each page and enter the most active habitat first to reveal core creature behavior early.

steps.title: Test Yoshi's Full Move Set on Every Creature
steps.description: Use Gobble, Egg Throw, Flutter Jump, Ground Pound, Tail Flick, and Sprint to trigger unique reactions.

steps.title: Prioritize Big Discoveries, Then Cleanup
steps.description: Clear the main habitat objective first, then revisit for hidden reactions and missed collectibles.

steps.title: Reuse Creature Knowledge Across Chapters
steps.description: Bring known creatures into new contexts to unlock extra events and alternate routes later in the book.

steps.title: Bank Stars, Smiley Flowers, and Tokens
steps.description: Use Stars for progression, Smiley Flowers for tools, and Tokens for discovery hints when routes stall.

quickTips: Progress in Yoshi and the Mysterious Book comes from experiments, not only from movement speed.
Replays are valuable because page states evolve after chapter progress.
Tail Flick placement and bubble timing solve many early route blockers.
Check Mr. E notes after each habitat to avoid missing high-value discoveries.

yoshiWalkthrough.title: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book Walkthrough
yoshiWalkthrough.intro: This Yoshi and the Mysterious Book walkthrough follows chapter flow by habitat objectives, then adds replay checkpoints for missed discoveries and Smiley Flowers.

cards.name: Opening Pages and First Habitat
cards.description: Meet Mr. E, activate the magnifying glass flow, and complete the first discovery loop.

cards.name: Chapter 1 Wildwoods Route
cards.description: Map creature interactions in order and unlock follow-up page entries through discovery chains.

cards.name: Crazee Dayzee and Flower Bloom Route
cards.description: Use carrying, feeding, and bloom triggers to reveal chapter utility patterns early.

cards.name: Scatterpuff and Glubbit Habitat Cleanup
cards.description: Clear hidden side routes and bubble-assisted vertical paths before finalizing chapter progress.

cards.name: Bunchabee Route and Cave Checks
cards.description: Resolve hive interactions and cave platform checks to secure hard-to-see collectibles.

cards.name: Replay Pass and Encyclopedia Completion
cards.description: Use Mr. E hints and Token support to close remaining discovery gaps efficiently.

milestones: Complete each habitat main discovery first
Finish one replay cleanup before opening new chapters
Track creature reactions that recur across habitats

yoshiCreatureDiscoveryGuide.title: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book Creature Discovery Guide
yoshiCreatureDiscoveryGuide.intro: Each Yoshi and the Mysterious Book creature acts like a puzzle tool. Track where each appears, what action triggers it, and how it supports route progression.

items.name: Crazee Dayzee
items.description: Carries on Yoshi back, reacts to food, and unlocks flower bloom interactions tied to discoveries.

items.name: Glubbit
items.description: Creates bubble platforms for vertical movement and hidden upper-platform routes.

items.name: Bunchabee
items.description: Tongue captures and hive interactions gate several habitat objectives and collectible routes.

items.name: Scatterpuff
items.description: Associated with multi-path habitats where side checks often hide Smiley Flowers.

items.name: Croakaoke
items.description: Jump order and timing affect musical reaction patterns that unlock new notes.

items.name: Thudd
items.description: Behavior shifts after inhale actions, enabling alternate interactions and discovery outcomes.

yoshiSmileyFlowerLocations.title: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book Smiley Flower Locations
yoshiSmileyFlowerLocations.intro: Use this Yoshi and the Mysterious Book Smiley Flower map to clear hidden routes, creature-trigger rewards, and post-clear cleanup paths.

solutions.name: Creature Inhale Reward Route
solutions.description: Trigger inhale interactions with Crazee Dayzee variants to spawn hidden Smiley Flower rewards.

solutions.name: Scatterpuff Secret Area Set
solutions.description: Two flowers sit off the primary route, so side corridors must be checked before stage completion.

solutions.name: Glubbit Upper Leaf Platform
solutions.description: Bubble timing unlocks the upper-right leaf route where one of the easiest misses appears.

solutions.name: Bunchabee Cave Platform Route
solutions.description: Inspect lower leaf platforms beneath the cave opening and clear Bunchabee blockers.

solutions.name: Crazee Dayzee Bloom Check
solutions.description: Carry Crazee Dayzee through bloom clusters to reveal additional collectible triggers.

solutions.name: Post-Clear Habitat Replay
solutions.description: Run a second pass after main objective completion using Mr. E hints and Tokens.

managementTips: Run collectible cleanup immediately after each chapter clear to reduce backtracking.
Use route notes for each habitat so hidden side paths are not re-tested blindly.
Treat bloom triggers and bubble routes as dedicated collectible checks, not optional flavor actions.
Spend Tokens on the final missed entries only after you complete all visible routes.

yoshiControlsAndMoves.title: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book Controls and Moves
yoshiControlsAndMoves.subtitle: Learn Yoshi's main movement, creature, and discovery actions, including Tail Flick, Gobble, egg throws, Flutter Jump, Ground Pound, Sprint, and Observe.
yoshiControlsAndMoves.intro: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book is built around experimenting with creatures. The best way to progress is to try each move on creatures, objects, and habitat features, then watch how the environment reacts.

steps.whatItDoes: Puts a creature or object onto Yoshi's back.
steps.bestUse: Use this on creatures that can ride with Yoshi, then move, sprint, or repeat the move to throw them or trigger a special action.

steps.whatItDoes: Uses Yoshi's tongue to taste or swallow certain creatures.
steps.bestUse: Try Gobble on new creatures to learn reactions, create eggs, or discover hidden behavior.

steps.input: Use after Gobble creates an egg
steps.whatItDoes: Throws eggs at creatures, objects, and environmental targets.
steps.bestUse: Use eggs to provoke creature reactions, uncover mysteries, and reach discoveries that simple jumping cannot solve.

steps.whatItDoes: Lets Yoshi hover briefly after jumping or falling.
steps.bestUse: Use it to cross gaps, correct jumps, and stay close to airborne creatures or moving platforms.

steps.input: Tilt the Left Stick down while mid-air
steps.whatItDoes: Drops Yoshi straight down to pound the ground or a creature below.
steps.bestUse: Use it on creatures and ground spots to shake loose items, flatten targets, or trigger habitat reactions.

steps.input: Keep moving in the same direction
steps.whatItDoes: Yoshi breaks into a faster run after moving steadily.
steps.bestUse: Use Sprint to cross wider spaces and test how a creature riding on Yoshi's back reacts at higher speed.

steps.input: Pause, watch, or duck with the Left Stick down
steps.whatItDoes: Lets you study creature behavior and stay out of the way.
steps.bestUse: Use this when a discovery is not obvious. Many habitats reward watching before acting.

yoshiReleaseDateAndPlatform.title: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book Release Date and Platform
yoshiReleaseDateAndPlatform.subtitle: Check the release date, platform, supported modes, file size, rating, and purchase details for Yoshi's Switch 2 adventure.
yoshiReleaseDateAndPlatform.intro: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book launched as a Nintendo Switch 2 title on May 21, 2026. The game focuses on single-player discovery, creature study, and puzzle-platforming inside Mr. E's living book.

items.label: Release Date
items.details: Listed by Nintendo in the US and UK as May 21, 2026.

items.label: Platform
items.details: The game is listed as a Nintendo Switch 2 title and is promoted as only playable on Nintendo Switch 2.

items.label: Genre
items.details: The official store pages classify it as a platforming adventure.

items.label: Supported Play Modes
items.details: All three Nintendo Switch 2 play modes are listed.

items.label: Download Size
items.details: Nintendo lists the game file size as 19.6 GB.

items.label: Age Rating
items.details: US and UK listings show family-friendly age ratings with fantasy violence notes.

items.label: Nintendo Switch Online
items.details: The official Nintendo page lists Save Data Cloud support.

items.label: amiibo Support
items.value: Compatible amiibo can give daily fortunes and tokens
items.details: Tokens can be used to unlock hints about discoveries.

items.label: Purchase Options
items.details: US review pricing lists digital at about $59.99 and physical at about $69.99, with final pricing depending on region and retailer.

yoshiBossesAndCharacters.title: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book Bosses and Characters
yoshiBossesAndCharacters.subtitle: Meet Yoshi, Mr. E, Bowser Jr., Kamek, and the curious creatures that shape each habitat.
yoshiBossesAndCharacters.intro: The story begins when Mr. E, a talking encyclopedia, lands on Yoshi's Island after losing track of what is inside his pages. Yoshi enters the book to study creatures, while Bowser Jr. and Kamek stir up trouble while searching for something inside Mr. E.

items.name: Yoshi
items.description: Yoshi leads the adventure by jumping into Mr. E's pages, exploring habitats, studying creatures, and using moves like Gobble, egg throwing, Flutter Jump, Ground Pound, Sprint, and Tail Flick.
items.whyItMatters: Most discoveries come from using Yoshi's moves in different ways instead of simply reaching the end of a stage.

items.name: Mr. E
items.description: Mr. E is Mister Encyclopedia, a mysterious talking book that crash-lands on Yoshi's Island and needs help remembering the creatures inside his pages.
items.whyItMatters: He frames the whole game around creature research, page exploration, names, hints, and discoveries.

items.name: Bowser Jr.
items.description: Bowser Jr. appears in habitats and is searching for something inside Mr. E. The opening story connects him to the mysterious book and the hunt for the Bewilder Bird.
items.whyItMatters: His appearances add conflict to the otherwise cozy discovery-focused adventure.

items.name: Kamek
items.description: Kamek appears alongside Bowser Jr. and helps create trouble during the journey through Mr. E's pages.
items.whyItMatters: Kamek supports Bowser Jr.'s role as the recurring obstacle in Yoshi's exploration.

items.name: Bewilder Bird
items.description: The Bewilder Bird is tied to Bowser Jr.'s search and gives the story a central mystery beyond simply cataloging creatures.
items.whyItMatters: It explains why Bowser Jr. is interested in Mr. E and keeps the main plot moving.

items.name: Crazee Dayzee
items.description: Crazee Dayzee is a flower-like creature found across multiple habitats in different colors.
items.whyItMatters: It is one of the early examples of how carrying, jumping, or pounding creatures can reveal new reactions.

items.name: Habitat Creatures
items.description: Mr. E's chapters contain dozens of creatures with different abilities, such as growing crops, blowing bubbles, singing, floating, being thrown like darts, or acting like boomerangs.
items.whyItMatters: Each creature can open new routes, trigger discoveries, or teach you how other habitats work.

items.name: Boss and Rival Encounters
items.description: The game includes story encounters tied to Bowser Jr., Kamek, and creature habitats, but the overall focus stays on puzzle-solving, exploration, and discovery rather than hard combat.
items.whyItMatters: Players looking for a relaxed Yoshi game should expect gentle challenge, while players wanting difficult boss fights may find it lighter.

yoshiReviewAndBuyingGuide.title: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book Review and Buying Guide
yoshiReviewAndBuyingGuide.subtitle: A practical buying guide for players deciding whether Yoshi's discovery-focused Switch 2 adventure is worth picking up.
yoshiReviewAndBuyingGuide.intro: Reviews describe Yoshi and the Mysterious Book as a charming, cozy, exploration-driven puzzle-platformer. Its biggest appeal is experimenting with creatures and filling out Mr. E's pages, while its main drawbacks are light challenge, single-player-only design, and occasional pacing or control issues.

items.name: Overall Verdict
items.summary: A charming and creative 2D puzzle-platforming adventure built around discovery, experimentation, and creature behavior.
items.buyingAdvice: Worth buying if you want a relaxed Nintendo platformer with a strong sense of curiosity.

items.name: Best For
items.summary: Yoshi fans, younger players, cozy-game players, completionists, and anyone who enjoys poking around every corner for secrets.
items.buyingAdvice: A strong match if you prefer exploration and small surprises over difficult jumps or punishing bosses.

items.name: Main Strengths
items.summary: Reviewers praise the storybook visuals, smooth Switch 2 performance, creature variety, discovery loop, and Yoshi's familiar movement style.
items.buyingAdvice: Buy it for the creature interactions, habitat puzzles, and playful experimentation.

items.name: Main Weak Spots
items.summary: Common complaints include single-player-only design, longer load times, some confusing levels, occasional finicky controls, and a story that can feel thin.
items.buyingAdvice: Wait for a sale if you mainly want co-op, high difficulty, or a deep story.

items.name: Difficulty
items.summary: The game is easier and lower-pressure than many traditional platformers. The challenge is more about creative discovery than strict platforming skill.
items.buyingAdvice: Good for kids and casual players; less ideal if you want demanding boss fights or precision-heavy stages.

items.name: Exploration Value
items.summary: Each chapter encourages players to return, study creatures again, unlock hints, and fill out the encyclopedia-like pages.
items.buyingAdvice: Worth it if you enjoy checklist-style discoveries, hidden reactions, and creature collection.

items.name: Price Choice
items.summary: US review pricing lists the digital edition around $59.99 and the physical edition around $69.99, with pricing varying by region and retailer.
items.buyingAdvice: Choose digital for the lower listed price, or physical if you prefer collecting Nintendo Switch 2 cartridges.

items.name: Final Recommendation
items.summary: Buy it for cozy discovery, charming visuals, and a new twist on Yoshi. Skip or wait if you want a demanding platformer, multiplayer, or a more combat-heavy adventure.
items.buyingAdvice: Best treated as a relaxed exploration game, not as a hardcore platforming challenge.

faq.title: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book
faq.subtitle: Key questions players ask before and after starting Yoshi and the Mysterious Book.

questions.question: Is Yoshi and the Mysterious Book focused on combat?
questions.answer: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book is primarily discovery-focused, with creature interactions and habitat experimentation driving progression.

questions.question: How do discoveries work in Yoshi and the Mysterious Book?
questions.answer: Yoshi and the Mysterious Book discoveries are recorded by Mr. E and unlock new chapter routes, hints, and collectible opportunities.

questions.question: Does Yoshi and the Mysterious Book reward replaying habitats?
questions.answer: Yes. Yoshi and the Mysterious Book replays are central for missed Smiley Flowers, hidden reactions, and encyclopedia completion.

questions.question: What should I read first on this Yoshi and the Mysterious Book wiki?
questions.answer: Start with the Yoshi and the Mysterious Book Beginner Guide module, then follow the Walkthrough and Smiley Flower modules.
